issues.detail: The skill assumes a Linux/macOS environment and uses platform-specific commands, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: SD card photo recovery after format
scenarios.rationale: Baseline carves the live device directly; treatment images first with dd, hashes, then carves specific types with -t jpg,png,mov,mp4 and reviews audit.txt.

scenarios.name: CTF PNG with hidden embedded files
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for binwalk/strings and never actually runs foremost; treatment uses foremost -t all, parses audit.txt offsets, and extracts the carved zip.
